AAp.caption: Data / Behavior
AAp.doc: Settings that control the starting value, user interaction, and when the SVG signature is uploaded to Bubble.
AAp.name: data_behavior_settings

AAq.caption: Initial Signature
AAq.doc: Optional Bubble image, image URL, SVG data URL, or image data URL shown as the starting signature. It is displayed as a background image layer and new strokes are drawn on top.
AAq.name: initial_signature

AAr.caption: Enabled
AAr.doc: When checked, users can draw and toolbar buttons can run. When unchecked, the pad stays visible but does not accept drawing input.
AAr.name: enabled

AAs.caption: Commit Behavior
AAs.doc: Controls when the SVG signature is uploaded into Bubble's image value. on_stroke_end uploads after each completed stroke. manual waits for the Save signature action or toolbar button.
AAs.name: commit_behavior

AAt.caption: Commit Delay Milliseconds
AAt.doc: Delay after a stroke ends before auto-upload runs. Only applies when Commit Behavior is on_stroke_end.
AAt.name: commit_delay_ms

AAu.caption: File Name Prefix
AAu.doc: Prefix used for uploaded SVG file names. The plugin adds a timestamp and .svg extension.
AAu.name: file_name_prefix

AAv.caption: SVG Output
AAv.doc: Native mobile signatures are saved as SVG files. The Signature Data URL state also returns an SVG data URL.
AAv.name: output_settings

AAy.caption: Drawing
AAy.doc: Settings that control SVG stroke color, stroke width, smoothing, and pad background.
AAy.name: drawing_settings

AAz.caption: Pen Color
AAz.doc: Color used for new signature strokes.
AAz.name: pen_color

ABA.caption: Minimum Stroke Width
ABA.doc: Lower stroke-width bound used to calculate the SVG stroke width.
ABA.name: min_width

ABB.caption: Maximum Stroke Width
ABB.doc: Upper stroke-width bound used to calculate the SVG stroke width.
ABB.name: max_width

ABC.caption: Background Color
ABC.doc: Background fill used inside the signature SVG and visible drawing area.
ABC.name: background_color

ABD.caption: Minimum Point Distance
ABD.doc: Minimum distance a pointer must move before another point is recorded. Higher values produce smaller, simpler SVG paths.
ABD.name: min_distance

ABE.caption: Throttle Milliseconds
ABE.doc: Minimum time between recorded move points while drawing. Lower values capture more detail; higher values reduce path size.
ABE.name: throttle_ms

ABF.caption: UI
ABF.doc: Toolbar, labels, and button style settings for the visible signature control.
ABF.name: ui_settings

ABG.caption: Placeholder Text
ABG.doc: Text shown centered in the pad while no initial signature or drawn strokes are present.
ABG.name: placeholder_text

ABH.caption: Show Toolbar
ABH.doc: Shows or hides the toolbar container at the bottom of the element.
ABH.name: show_toolbar

ABI.caption: Show Clear Button
ABI.doc: Shows or hides the Clear button in the toolbar.
ABI.name: show_clear_button

ABJ.caption: Show Undo Button
ABJ.doc: Shows or hides the Undo button in the toolbar.
ABJ.name: show_undo_button

ABK.caption: Show Save Button
ABK.doc: Shows or hides the Save button in the toolbar. The workflow action can still save when this is hidden.
ABK.name: show_save_button

ABL.caption: Clear Button Label
ABL.doc: Text displayed inside the Clear toolbar button.
ABL.name: clear_button_label

ABM.caption: Undo Button Label
ABM.doc: Text displayed inside the Undo toolbar button.
ABM.name: undo_button_label

ABN.caption: Save Button Label
ABN.doc: Text displayed inside the Save toolbar button.
ABN.name: save_button_label

ABO.caption: Toolbar Background Color
ABO.doc: Background color of the toolbar area.
ABO.name: toolbar_background_color

ABP.caption: Button Background Color
ABP.doc: Background color used for toolbar buttons.
ABP.name: button_background_color

ABQ.caption: Button Text Color
ABQ.doc: Text color used inside toolbar buttons.
ABQ.name: button_text_color

ABR.caption: Button Border Color
ABR.doc: Border color used around toolbar buttons.
ABR.name: button_border_color

ABS.caption: Value
ABS.doc: Bubble image value containing the uploaded SVG file URL after a successful save.
ABS.name: value

ABT.caption: Signature Data URL
ABT.doc: Current signature as a data:image/svg+xml;base64 data URL. Updates while drawing and before upload.
ABT.name: signature_data_url

ABU.caption: Is Empty
ABU.doc: Yes when there is no initial signature and no drawn stroke.
ABU.name: is_empty

ABV.caption: Is Drawing
ABV.doc: Yes while the user is actively drawing a stroke.
ABV.name: is_drawing

ABW.caption: Is Uploading
ABW.doc: Yes while the SVG signature is being uploaded to Bubble.
ABW.name: is_uploading

ABX.caption: Stroke Count
ABX.doc: Number of user-drawn strokes currently stored. Initial signature images are not counted as strokes.
ABX.name: stroke_count

ABY.caption: Last Error
ABY.doc: Most recent runtime error message, or blank when the last operation succeeded.
ABY.name: last_error
